cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great to hear that, Vaishali! My name is Rohan, and I'm calling from Bank of America. We came across your profile, and we're interested in discussing a potential job opportunity with you.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, that sounds interesting. What kind of role is it, ji?
